data.title: Bernie Sanders Says Grew Up In A Family That Lived Paycheck-To-Paycheck, Slams Inequality: 'It's The Reason That Working People Live Shorter Lives Than The Rich'
data.description: Bernie Sanders highlighted how economic struggles and living paycheck to paycheck reduce life expectancy for working-class families compared to the rich

data.title: Australian Cannabis Producer Little Green Pharma Reports Record Revenue, 80% Increase In European Sales QoQ
Apple Intelligence's Meh Moment Ahead? Analyst Predicts 5 Months Of Build-Up Could Lead To A 'That's It?' Reaction
data.description: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman expressed skepticism about Apple's upcoming AI system, predicting that consumers may be underwhelmed or confused when Apple Intelligence is unveiled next week, despite months of anticipation.

data.title: Tylenol, Listerine Maker Kenvue Under Activist Spotlight With Starboard Value Stake — Overhaul Ahead For The Johnson & Johnson Spinoff?
data.description: Starboard Value, an activist investor, has reportedly acquired a substantial stake in Kenvue Inc, the company behind popular consumer products like Tylenol and Listerine.

data.title: Trump Turns Up To Serve Fries At McDonald's: 'I Could Do This All Day, I Wouldn't Mind This Job"
